title: Property Consultant - Select CityWalk - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Select CityWalk - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Select CityWalk, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Select CityWalk:
Select CityWalk is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Select CityWalk!
